name: Steam Pixel Art
description: Displays pixel art from the Divoom Gallery API for your currently played Steam game.
author: Tim

settings_schema.name: steam_api_key
settings_schema.label: Steam Web API Key
settings_schema.info: Your Steam Web API Key from https://steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey

settings_schema.name: min_likes
settings_schema.label: Minimum Likes
settings_schema.info: Minimum number of likes required for a pixel art to be displayed

settings_schema.name: display_duration
settings_schema.label: Display Duration (seconds)
settings_schema.info: How long to display each artwork

settings_schema.name: update_interval
settings_schema.label: Steam Check Interval (seconds)
settings_schema.info: How often to check Steam for game changes
